title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!
